---
name: Feature request
about: A new tool, a new data source, or expanded capability on an existing tool
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- The use case. "I have an X and need a Y" works better than
     "please add Z". -->

## Which tools would this touch?

<!-- A new tool, or a change to an existing one. -->

## Proposed shape

<!-- If it's a new tool: a sketch of name, inputs, and expected output
     shape. If it's a change to an existing tool: what would the
     description / inputSchema / outputSchema look like after? -->

## Authoritative source

<!-- Where would the data come from? URL of the API or download. If the
     source requires a license, say so explicitly — this affects whether
     the work can be bundled in a public npm package. -->

## Alternatives considered

## Additional context
